title: Golden Globes 2026 Winners List
text: Best Actress in a Motion Picture – Musical or Comedy. Winner: Rose Byrne for 'If I Had Legs I'd Kick You'. Other Nominees: Cynthia Erivo ('Wicked: For Good'); Kate Hudson ('Song Sung Blue'); Chase Infiniti ('One Battle After Another'); Amanda Seyfried ('The Testament of Ann Lee'); Emma Stone ('Bugonia'). Rose Byrne earned the Golden Globe in this category at the 83rd annual Golden Globes ceremony, which took place on January 11, 2026. The Australian actress expressed genuine surprise upon hearing her name announced, delivering an unprepared acceptance speech. She credited the film's writer-director Mary Bronstein and humorously noted the low-budget production, describing it as a project where 'We shot this movie in 25 days for like $8.50.'
